name: Squigley
short_description: Traverse and experience a massive, cohesive 2D world as Squigley. Use your wits, resources and unique movement mechanics in order to explore this dark digital world.
detailed_description:
Traverse a massive 2D world and overcome nail-biting platforming challenges using unique movement mechanics and objects in this difficult indie experience.

GET MOVING

Traverse the world with a fluid and fun movement system unlike any you've ever seen before. In Squigley, you hold percise control over your movement, allowing for clutch saves and close calls.

SPEND WISELY

Be resourceful, as you must carefully use your coins to maintain your progress through checkpoints in the massive overworld. If you have some to spare, there are plenty of customization and upgrade options!

CMD YOUR DESTINY

Not a fan of the difficulty? The command terminal allows for easy skips, fun cheats, and other tools to enhance accessibility, so everyone can enjoy Squigley!

BUDDY UP

Grab two controllers and pair up with a buddy to enjoy mutiplayer mode! Two players can control their character and can gravitate to each other while airborne to assist each other past a challenge.
